title: SaveTeachImage Property
description: Sets whether the camera image should be saved to a file when the model is taught.
notes:
When SaveTeachImage is "True" for an object, and a model for that object is taught from the RC+ Vision Guide window, the user will be prompted to choose the path and filename for the camera image used to teach the model.  This allows the user to record the image used at the time of teaching.

The default file name is: [seq name]_[obj name]_TeachImage.bmp

The path is saved in the registry for the next time a model image is saved.

Bitmap format is always used for the camera image file.

Vision Objects: SaveTeachImage Property
